Text: On 7 May 2004, the Special Rapporteur on extrajudicial, summary or arbitrary executions and the Special Rapporteur on torture and other cruel, inhuman or degrading treatment or punishment sent a joint urgent appeal to the State party regarding the authors’ and co-defendant’s case, asking for information about the allegations of torture and unfair trial. Paragraph 4.9, second sentence For The Minister of Justice read The Secretary for Justice
